---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us diagnose and fix bugs
title: "[BUG]"
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
Briefly describe what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the bug. If applicable, please add your import data.

**Expected behavior**
Briefly describe what you expected would happen.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Desktop (please complete the following information):**
 - OS: [e.g. iOS, Windows 10]
 - Browser [e.g. chrome, safari]
 - Version [e.g. 22] (if known)

**Smartphone (please complete the following information):**
 - Device: [e.g. iPhone, Galaxy]
 - OS: [e.g. iOS, Andriod]
 - Browser [e.g. stock browser, safari, firefox]
 - Version [e.g. 22] (if known)

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
